description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named build that runs in the default stage. The job should execute the following script steps: remove the build directory, delete any .deb files, delete the virtualenv at $VENV_PATH, create a Python 3.6 virtualenv at $VENV_PATH with virtualenv --python=python3.6, install requirements via $VENV_PATH/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt, make the virtualenv relocatable, build a Debian package using fpm -s dir -t deb -n pmx-console -v $BASE_VERSION-$CI_JOB_ID -d python3.6 -m "$MAINTAINER" --description "$DESC" etc usr, and finally run ~/add_repository.sh. Define the variables BASE_VERSION='0.1', DESC='Console client for ProxmoxVE', MAINTAINER='Alexander Teseyko <alexteko@gmail.com>', and VENV_PATH='usr/local/pmx-console/.venv'.
